news.summary: In Raleigh, North Carolina, on April 16, 2025, Tompkins Ventures introduced its new ReGlobalization toolkit and process to assist companies in navigating supply chain restructuring in order to succeed in the face of inflation, potential recession, and stock market fluctuations. The toolkit offers a comprehensive solution for businesses, including tools and strategies to optimize supply chains and mitigate risks. This launch aims to address the challenges presented by market uncertainties and help companies adapt and thrive.
news.headline: Tompkins Ventures launches ReGlobalization toolkit to guide companies through supply chain redesigns amid uncertainties.

news.summary: A company based in Boca Raton, Florida, ModMed® is making a significant investment in the field of eye care. They are offering access to their ophthalmology-focused Electronic Health Record (EHR) system to three community colleges in Illinois.
news.headline: ModMed donates EHR access to 3 Illinois community colleges to empower future ophthalmic technicians.

news.summary: Tyfone, a digital banking provider, revealed today that CCBank has selected the nFinia® Digital Banking Platform for its digital banking services. CCBank, based in Utah with assets surpassing $1 billion and six branches statewide, aimed to partner with a forward-thinking digital banking provider. Their decision was driven by the desire to provide customers with a modern, user-friendly interface and intuitive digital banking products as the bank continues to expand and innovate.
news.headline: CCBank ($1B assets) selects Tyfone for nFinia digital banking platform, aiming to offer innovative tools to customers.

news.summary: On April 7, 2025, the third EU-Ukraine Tech Summit 2025 took place in Warsaw, Poland, organized by London PR Lab at the Google for Startups Campus. The event saw a gathering of more than 200 attendees, including Ukrainian startup founders, EU policymakers, investors, and tech experts from around the world.
news.headline: EU-Ukraine Tech Summit 2025 in Warsaw attracted over 200 attendees, including Ukrainian startup founders and global tech experts.

news.summary: Avalon Healthcare Solutions, based in Tampa, Florida, has recently been granted U.S. Patent No. 12,148,534 B1 for their APEA platform. This innovative platform has been acknowledged for its ability to revolutionize real-time policy enforcement and enhance smarter diagnostics decisions. Operating as the nation's sole Lab Insights company, Avalon Healthcare Solutions has received this notable recognition in April 2025.
news.headline: Avalon Healthcare Solutions patented Lab Claims Review Tech revolutionizes diagnostics, earns US Patent No. 12,148,534 B1.

news.summary: Twelve innovative cybersecurity firms were honored for their excellence in EMA's top Vendor Vision report. This recognition was given by Enterprise Management Associates (EMA), a prominent IT and data management research and consulting company. The announcement was made in Lafayette, Colo., on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: EMA highlights 12 cybersecurity innovators in annual report, ahead of 2025 RSA Conference. Leading IT research firm recognizes excellence.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, in Houston, Bot Auto revealed the establishment of its Strategic Advisory Board. The company is a leader in autonomous trucking, offering Transportation as a Service (TaaS) through its Autonomous Trucking solutions. This move signifies a significant development in the logistics industry, as Bot Auto continues to innovate and shape the future of transportation.
news.headline: Autonomous trucking company Bot Auto forms Strategic Advisory Board to enhance logistics growth.

news.summary: Project Big Sky by ECD features a sky-blue American-made Defender 110 that combines impressive performance with custom luxury and meticulous craftsmanship.
news.headline: ECD's Project Big Sky: A sky-blue, American Defender 110 offering luxury and performance with handcrafted detail.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, TOYO Co., Ltd (Nasdaq: TOYO, OTC: TOYWF), a leading solar solutions firm, welcomed His Excellency Abiy Ahmed Ali, Prime Minister of Ethiopia, to its advanced solar cell manufacturing plant in Phu Tho Province, Tokyo.
news.headline: Ethiopian PM visits TOYO's solar facility in Vietnam, boosting renewable energy partnership.

news.summary: Local grocery store extends invitation to {N}power® members for celebrations, offering a complimentary state-themed reusable tote bag and exclusive discounts. Based in LAKEWOOD, Colo., on April 16, 2025, Natural Grocers® - a prominent family-owned retailer specializing in organic and natural products - is providing customers with this opportunity.
news.headline: Natural Grocers celebrates National North Dakota Day with free state-themed tote and savings for {N}power® members, April 19-21, 2025.

news.summary: Fortress Solutions, based in PLANO, Texas, and a prominent provider of telecom and technology services worldwide, has teamed up with Airspan Networks Inc. to assist in utilizing a $42.7 million grant granted by the National Telecommunications and Information Administration (NTIA)'s Public...
news.headline: Fortress Solutions teams up with Airspan for $42.7M grant to advance Open RAN tech.

news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB) is currently experiencing a surge in on-chain activity and burn rates, despite price consolidation. The cryptocurrency is priced at $0.00001163 with a market cap of $6.9 billion, showing a 7-day positive trend of 6.2% but a 24-hour decrease of 2.9%. Comparatively, Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE) is priced at $0.1534 with a market cap of $22.8 billion, showcasing a 7-day negative trend of 5% and a 24-hour drop of 4.07%. Another cryptocurrency, Pepe (CRYPTO: PEPE), is priced at $0.057127 with a market cap of $2.99 billion, displaying a 7-day decrease of 12.4% and a 24-hour decrease of 3.2%. Crypto trader Javon Marks is optimistic about SHIB, setting a breakout target at $0.000081, which reflects a potential increase of over 550%. For more details, refer to the full article on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Shiba Inu burns 60 million SHIB in one transaction amid increased activity. Prices: $0.00001163, market cap $6.9 billion.

news.summary: Renowned surgeons from around the world will convene in New York City from April 24 to April 27, 2025, for the Kassir Plastic Surgeries 2025 Master Course. This event marks the beginning of a new era in facial rejuvenation, with cutting-edge techniques and innovation at its core. The gathering in NYC is set to host a significant number of experts and professionals in the field, showcasing the latest advancements and best practices in cosmetic procedures. The event promises to be a transformative experience, offering insight into the future of beauty and aesthetics.
news.headline: Top plastic surgeons will convene in NYC for Kassir Plastic Surgeries 2025 Master Course on facial rejuvenation, catalyzing a new era of beauty.

news.summary: In Alexandria, Va., global business travel professionals are facing challenges due to recent US government actions, such as tariffs, cross-border policies, and entry restrictions. This has created uncertainty about the impact on business travel for 2025. A poll conducted by the Global Business Travel Association (GBTA) surveyed over 900 industry respondents and found that many are expecting declines in business travel volume, spending, and revenue. This situation highlights the need for professionals to adapt to a complex and changing landscape in the industry.
news.headline: 1/3 Global Travel Managers predict significant decrease in 2025 business travel due to US govt policies.

news.summary: On April 16, 2025, the American Liver Foundation (ALF) announced the upcoming Liver Life Advocacy Summit in Washington, D.C., scheduled for April 29 and 30. The event aims to unite individuals impacted by liver disease, including patients, caregivers, and family members, to advocate for ALF's mission. This gathering will bring together a significant number of participants from various regions nationwide to raise awareness and address the challenges associated with liver health.
news.headline: ALF to host Liver Life Advocacy Summit in Wash. DC on Apr 29-30 for patients, caregivers, family members affected by liver disease.

news.summary: Northwest Permanente (NWP) from Oregon and The Permanente Medical Group (TPMG) of Northern California have officially affiliated on April 16, 2025. This collaboration between the two physician-led groups aims to enhance high-value care and foster innovation. The partnership brings together a significant number of healthcare professionals from both regions to drive forward advancements in medical services.
news.headline: Oregon's Northwest Permanente affiliates with The Permanente Medical Group of Northern California to boost high-value care and innovation.

news.summary: A global gathering will be held to increase understanding and unite individuals affected by RRP along with the healthcare professionals assisting them. RRP is a rare, long-lasting condition caused primarily by HPV 6/11, affecting both children and adults.
news.headline: Precigen & RRP Foundation to host 2025 International RRP Awareness Day on June 11th, raising awareness for rare disease.

news.summary: Chicago - On April 16, 2025, Assembly Health, a prominent revenue cycle management company serving numerous physician practices, post-acute facilities, and behavioral health facilities, announced the appointment of Greg Shorten as Chief Commercial Officer and Michael Murphy as Chief Financial Officer. This move comes as the company continues to expand its operations, catering to thousands of healthcare providers. This strategic decision aims to strengthen the leadership team as they navigate the complex healthcare landscape.
news.headline: Assembly Health™ announces new executives Greg Shorten as Chief Commercial Officer and Michael Murphy as Chief Financial Officer in 2025.

news.summary: In Dundalk, Ireland, Cimpress plc (Nasdaq: CMPR) has scheduled a public Q&A call for Thursday, May 1, 2025, at 8:00 am ET. This comes after the release of its Q3 FY2025 financial results at 4:05 pm ET on Wednesday, April 30, 2025. The live call will be accessible at ir.cimpress.com, with a replay available afterward at the same link. Questions can be submitted live via chat during the call, and investors also have the option to presubmit questions before 11:00 pm ET on the previous day.
news.headline: Cimpress to host public Q&A call on May 1, 2025 at 8:00 am ET post release of Q3 FY2025 financial results on April 30 at 4:05 pm ET. Call accessible on ir.cimpress.com. Investors can submit questions in advance.

news.summary: Minneapolis-based company SunOpta Inc. has announced the scheduling of the release of their first quarter financial results for 2025 along with a conference call. This event will provide insight into the company's performance during the initial months of the year. Stakeholders and investors are encouraged to participate in the conference call to gain valuable information on SunOpta Inc.'s financial position and strategic outlook moving forward. Stay tuned for specific dates and details regarding this important event.
news.headline: SunOpta Inc. in Minneapolis to release first quarter 2025 financial results and hold conference call.

news.summary: Investors with a focus on healthcare are showing their support for Xtant Medical Holdings, Inc. (NYSE American: XTNT) by backing the company's strategic vision to enhance their orthobiologics segment, which offers higher margins. This support comes as Xtant Medical announces new product launches. The company, headquartered in BELGRADE, Mont., revealed these updates on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: Xtant Medical reports 18-19% revenue growth in Q1 2025, announces secondary private sale by OrbiMed. Investors back shift to orthobiologics.

news.summary: BlueLinx Holdings Inc. (NYSE: BXC), a prominent U.S. wholesale distributor of building products, is set to release its first quarter 2025 financial results on April 29, 2025, after the market closes. The company will hold a conference call on April 30, 2025, at 10:00 AM ET to discuss the results, led by Shyam Reddy, President and CEO, and Kimberly DeBrock, VP, Chief Accounting Officer, and Interim Principal Financial Officer. The call will be available via webcast.
news.headline: BlueLinx Holdings Inc. (NYSE: BXC) will release Q1 2025 financial results on April 29 and host a conference call on April 30 at 10:00 AM ET.

news.summary: Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF), a prominent player in augmented reality and artificial intelligence for beauty and fashion, has partnered with UNICSKIN, a Spanish Techno-Beauty brand. This collaboration aims to elevate the online skincare journey by leveraging advanced AI technology for skin assessments. Through this integration, Perfect Corp.'s AI Skin Analysis feature is now available on UNICSKIN's e-commerce platform. Customers can receive personalized recommendations for LED masks tailored to their individual skin needs in real-time.
news.headline: Perfect Corp and UNICSKIN partner for AI Skin Analysis; personalize LED mask recs online.

news.summary: In Hauppauge, NY, and San Jose, California, Orbic and GCT have announced a Letter of Intent to collaborate on the development and distribution of Orbic-branded Fixed Wireless Access (FWA) Gateway and Mobile Hotspot. These devices will feature GCT's Verizon-certified 5G module. The partnership aims to combine Orbic's branding expertise with GCT's advanced technology to bring innovative connectivity solutions to the market.
news.headline: Orbic North America and GCT Semiconductor sign LOI to supply Orbic-branded 5G products with Verizon certification.

news.summary: In West Palm Beach, Florida, PSQ Holdings, Inc. (NYSE: PSQH) which is commonly referred to as PublicSquare, aided Tenacity Arms, an American firearms manufacturer and online seller, when they faced a crisis. The payment processor of Tenacity Arms issued a warning of freezing funds and discontinuing services, endangering their operations. In response, PublicSquare's fintech branch introduced the innovative PSQ Payments solution alongside a seamless Shopify integration. This swift action allowed Tenacity Arms to transition smoothly, averting a potential business standstill.
news.headline: PublicSquare's PSQ Payments aids Tenacity Arms after cancellation by payment processor. PSQH stock. Shopify integrated.

news.summary: A company specializing in advanced wireless connectivity solutions, Airgain, Inc. (NASDAQ: AIRG), will conduct a conference call on May 7, 2025, at 5:00 p.m. Eastern time (2:00 p.m. Pacific time) to review its financial performance for the first quarter ending March 31, 2025. The presentation will be led by Airgain management, with a Q&A session to follow. The event details are as follows: Date: May 7, 2025 Time: 5:00 p.m. Eastern.
news.headline: Airgain (NASDAQ: AIRG) to host Q1 2025 conference call on May 7, 2025, 5:00 p.m. ET, discussing financial results.

news.summary: In Atlanta, the renowned fintech public relations and marketing firm, William Mills Agency, shared that Eloise B. Mills has been honored as a 2025 Dean’s Laureate for Florida State University’s College of Communications and Information. This distinguished title is awarded to individuals who embody the core principles of the college at an exceptional level. Eloise B. Mills is part of the inaugural group of laureates, comprising a total of ten noteworthy individuals.
news.headline: Eloise Mills named as 2025 Dean’s Laureate for Florida State University’s College of Communications and Information by William Mills Agency.

news.summary: In San Jose, California, cybersecurity company Stellar Cyber has introduced its Global Managed Security Service Provider (MSSP) Partner Program called Infinity. The program is aimed at assisting MSSPs in capitalizing on fresh market prospects and boosting revenue. Leveraging the Stellar Cyber Open XDR Security Operations Platform, this initiative aims to enable MSSPs to enhance profitability, lower expenses, and increase revenue streams. Notably, Stellar Cyber is recognized as a leader in security operations.
news.headline: Stellar Cyber launches Infinity Global MSSP Partner Program to boost growth, help MSSPs tap into new opportunities.

news.summary: In Eden Prairie, Minnesota, C.H. Robinson reports that their artificial intelligence technology has successfully completed more than three million shipping tasks. This marks a significant milestone for the company in integrating AI into their operations. The use of AI at C.H. Robinson, a major player in the logistics industry, showcases the advancement and widespread adoption of technology in streamlining shipping processes.
news.headline: CH Robinson reports AI has completed over 3 million shipping tasks, transforming logistics operations.

news.summary: Alight, Inc. (NYSE: ALIT), a prominent provider of cloud-based human capital and technology-enabled services, was recently named as a top workplace for mental wellbeing in 2025 by Newsweek and Plant-A Insights Group. This recognition was achieved through a thorough assessment process that included the analysis of public data, consultations with HR experts, and extensive confidential online surveys. Alight, Inc. stands out as one of America’s Greatest Workplaces, demonstrating its commitment to prioritizing mental health in the workplace.
news.headline: Alight (NYSE: ALIT) recognized as one of America’s Greatest Workplaces for Mental Wellbeing in 2025 by Newsweek.

news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Evolv Technologies Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: EVLV), a prominent security tech company focused on AI solutions for enhanced safety, revealed a new collaboration. The company has partnered with Cosm, an immersive entertainment firm known for innovating experiences in sports and entertainment. This partnership will see Evolv's cutting-edge Express® systems deployed in Cosm's initial sites situated in the Los Angeles and Dallas metropolitan regions.
news.headline: Evolv partners with Cosm to bring AI-based security systems to two locations in LA and Dallas. #InnovationLeader

news.summary: Today, Frenos, the autonomous OT security assessment platform based in Charlotte, North Carolina, named Colin Murphy as its new Chief Hacking Officer. With more than ten years of experience in cybersecurity research, practice, and technology innovation, Murphy previously served as the CIO at KnowBe4. During his tenure, he played a key role in the company's growth from a startup to achieving a unicorn status valued at $1 billion. Following an IPO, the company was later acquired by a private equity firm. Murphy’s extensive background makes him a valuable addition as the new Chief Hacking Officer at Frenos.
news.headline: Frenos names Colin Murphy, former KnowBe4 CIO, as Chief Hacking Officer; he played key role in KnowBe4's journey to $1B status and acquisition.

news.summary: Harmonic Security, based in London and San Francisco, has recently gained recognition from Gartner, a leading analyst firm. It has been named among the top 20 ‘Representative Vendors in Data Loss Prevention’. According to a report by Gartner, the DLP market is changing to overcome the drawbacks of traditional methods that were reliant on resource-heavy content inspection, leading to performance challenges with a high rate of false positives. The evolving market is seeking more efficient solutions to address these issues.
news.headline: Harmonic Security is acknowledged by Gartner as Representative Vendor for Data Loss Prevention, addressing limitations in DLP market.

news.summary: SAN DIEGO--XiFin® Inc., a prominent revenue cycle management (RCM) solutions provider with artificial intelligence (AI) integration, will showcase innovative RCM practices and valuable insights at the 30th Annual Executive War College (EWC) in New Orleans, LA on April 29-30. The company will contribute to four sessions at the influential event, emphasizing effective strategies and hands-on approaches in the current industry landscape. This initiative underlines XiFin®'s commitment to delivering cutting-edge RCM solutions amidst significant industry shifts.
news.headline: XiFin showcased AI in RCM through partnership with Northwell Health at EWC. Will speak at 4 sessions at 30th Annual Executive War College in New Orleans. #AI #RCM #EWC

news.summary: Kristine Hunt, with over two decades of experience in developing high-impact growth strategies, has been appointed as the Senior Vice President of Growth Marketing in SOMERVILLE, Mass. Hunt's extensive expertise will play a crucial role in shaping the company's marketing initiatives.
news.headline: Kristine Hunt brings 20+ years of experience to SVP of Growth Marketing at SmartBear amid expanding software dev and AI demand.

news.summary: In Phoenix, ADESA, a major player in wholesale auto auctions and a subsidiary of online auto giant Carvana (NYSE: CVNA), unveiled the new ADESA Simulcast feature on its enhanced digital platform and mobile apps. ADESA Simulcast has provided wholesale buyers with real-time access to ADESA's auctions nationwide for years. The updated platform now seamlessly combines ADESA's two primary digital auction offerings, along with expanding its range of services.
news.headline: ADESA upgrades digital platform, launches ADESA Simulcast on mobile apps, offers live access to auctions nationwide.

news.summary: Indigo's MRV strategy hailed as top industry standard with an impressive 85% drop in administrative workload, which effectively paves the way for significant expansion. The cumulative milestone of over 1 million carbon removals and reductions through Indigo's initiatives solidifies soil as a recognized asset class. The recognition came during an event in Boston on April 16, 2025.
news.headline: Indigo hits 1M carbon removals on US cropland, with an 85% decrease in admin burden, pushing soil as key asset class.

news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, Daimon Robotics unveiled their latest product lineup on April 16, 2025. The launch showcased the groundbreaking DM-Tac W, the world's first Multi-dimensional High-resolution High-frequency Vision-based Tactile Sensors, as well as the Multi-dimensional Tactile Sensing Dexterous system. This release marks a significant advancement in sensor technology, introducing cutting-edge features to enhance tactile sensing capabilities.
news.headline: Daimon Robotics launches new product line on April 16, including world's first DM-Tac W sensors.

news.summary: Ecolab Inc. in St. Paul, Minnesota, has revealed a 5% trade surcharge on their solutions and services within the United States beginning on May 1, 2025. The purpose of this surcharge is to counteract the effects of increasing raw material expenses resulting from shifts in global trade regulations. Despite this adjustment, Ecolab remains committed to providing value that surpasses the overall price raise, aiming to alleviate the burden on customers. Christophe Beck, the chair of Ecolab, emphasized the company's dedication to supporting customers through these changes.
news.headline: Ecolab to impose 5% trade surcharge in US from May 1, 2025 due to rising raw material costs and trade policy changes.

news.summary: A recent report by Deloitte reveals that 77% of top-performing companies consider agreement management crucial for their achievements. In the latest development, Docusign (NASDAQ: DOCU) has launched the inaugural AI contract agent tailored to enhance workflow efficiency. This innovation aims to revolutionize the way organizations handle contracts, offering a more streamlined approach to managing agreements.
news.headline: DocuSign unveils AI contract agent to improve workflows77% top firms value agreement mgmt, says Deloitte - PRNewswire, April 16, 2025

news.summary: Alpha Metallurgical Resources, Inc., a prominent U.S. supplier of metallurgical products for the steel sector, is set to reveal its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 before the commencement of trading on May 9, 2025. This information will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's operations and financial health. Alpha Metallurgical Resources, Inc. is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol AMR, and its upcoming financial report is eagerly anticipated by investors and industry analysts. Stay tuned for detailed updates on the company's performance in the first quarter of 2025.
news.headline: Alpha Metallurgical Resources to report first quarter 2025 financial results on May 9; NYSE: AMR, steel supplier.

news.summary: Apryse continues to enhance its spreadsheet, translation, and intelligent data extraction features, showcasing its dedication to streamlining the document lifecycle and revolutionizing developers' SDK experience. The updates come as part of Apryse's commitment to innovation. The company, based in Denver, announced the improvements on April 16, 2025. The upgrades promise to elevate user experience, with significant enhancements to the software's capabilities.
news.headline: Apryse releases new SDK features in Denver on April 16, 2025, focused on spreadsheets, translations, and data extraction.

news.summary: A class action settlement has been proposed for individuals who purchased common shares of Trevali Mining Corporation in the primary or secondary market between October 9, 2020, and August 15, 2022. If you acquired and held some or all of these shares as of the close of trading on April 14, 2022, you may be eligible to participate in the settlement.
news.headline: Proposed settlement for class action against Trevali Mining Corp for investors between Oct 9, 2020 - Aug 15, 2022. Hearing set for approval.

news.summary: This Saturday, April 19th, the Blue Zones Project Kickoff will take place at the PPL Center in Allentown, PA, from 10 a.m. to 3 p.m. This event will inaugurate the Blue Zones Project Allentown, a community initiative aimed at improving well-being. The celebration is open to the public and is highly anticipated.
news.headline: Blue Zones Project Kick-Off in Allentown on April 19th at PPL Center from 10 a.m. - 3 p.m. - public launch of Blue Zones Project Allentown.
Rubio and Envoy Witkoff to travel to Paris April 16-18 for Ukraine talks with Europeans - Statement.

news.summary: A recent report delves into the factors driving success in enterprise AI in 2025 and beyond, emphasizing the need for updating obsolete technology and establishing responsible AI protocols. EPAM Systems, Inc. (NYSE: EPAM), a prominent player in digital transformation and services, unveiled these insights. The report's focus includes the importance of modernizing technology and instituting ethical AI practices for continued success in the evolving landscape of AI enterprise post-2025.
news.headline: EPAM study highlights factors delaying AI adoption for businesses in 2025 and beyond, advocating for improved technology and governance.

news.summary: In Las Vegas on April 16, 2025, CleanArc Data Centers, a company specializing in renewable energy-focused hyperscale data center campuses, revealed a strategic investment partnership with Snowhawk that will advance its development plans. The collaboration aims to accelerate the company's expansion with a focus on hyperscale infrastructure. This investment signifies a significant step for CleanArc, and underlines its commitment to sustainable technology solutions.
news.headline: Townsend Group invests in CleanArc Data Centers to accelerate hyperscale development plans. - LAS VEGAS, April 16, 2025

news.summary: A recent collaboration between a manufacturing company and Palantir aims to boost production capabilities using Palantir's innovative software platform. The partnership, announced on April 16, 2025, seeks to enhance the manufacturing process for autonomous underwater vehicles (AUVs) by incorporating AI technology. This initiative is expected to significantly scale up production capabilities, particularly benefiting the U.S. defense industrial base. The partnership underscores the importance of leveraging advanced technologies to enhance manufacturing processes.
news.headline: Vatn Systems and Palantir team up to boost AUV manufacturing with AI technology for national defense.

news.summary: Gurucul has introduced a Next-Gen SIEM that features new multi-agent AI workflows and an improved Sme AI copilot. This advanced system provides the SecOps team with autonomous automation capabilities, allowing for efficient data management and optimization. By enabling prioritization and auto-triage of genuine threats, the Next-Gen SIEM reduces investigation time by 58%. Additionally, automated responses are triggered to address security incidents promptly.
news.headline: Gurucul introduces self-driving SIEM with AI, reducing investigation time by 58% and enabling automated responses.

news.summary: Zenity, a pioneering company specializing in enhancing the security and governance of Agentic AI, has been recognized in a recent report by Forrester, a well-known analyst. This marks a significant achievement for Zenity, positioning them as a leading vendor in the field. The report, titled 'The AI Report,' highlights Zenity as the first provider of an end-to-end security and governance platform for Agentic AI. This recognition is a testament to Zenity's commitment to innovation and excellence. The report, released on April 16, 2025, sheds light on the vital role Zenity plays in ensuring the integrity and safety of AI technology. This acknowledgment by Forrester underscores Zenity's growing influence and impact in the industry.
news.headline: Zenity named notable vendor in Forrester's AI Governance Landscape Report; leader in AI security. NEW YORK, April 16, 2025.
